name: facebook-webhook-kafka-pipeline
description: Bai 2 - Xu ly thoi gian thuc voi Facebook Webhook va Kafka

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:webhook" "npm run start:core" "npm run start:retry"
scripts.test:syntax: node --check src/backend-api/index.js && node --check src/backend-api/facebookGraphClient.js && node --check src/webhook-service/index.js && node --check src/core-service/index.js && node --check src/retry-service/index.js
